properties.serializedData:
{"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "# SpyCloud SIP (Session Identity Protection) Dashboard
**Stolen Session Cookie Monitoring** - Track stolen session cookies, hijacked sessions, and cookie-based account takeover risks.

> This workbook focuses exclusively on SpyCloudSipCookies_CL data for monitoring stolen browser session cookies exfiltrated by infostealers.

---"}, "name": "title"}, {"type": 9, "content": {"version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "parameters": [{"id": "sip_time_range", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "TimeRange", "type": 4, "isRequired": true, "value": {"durationMs": 2592000000}, "typeSettings": {"selectableValues": [{"durationMs": 86400000}, {"durationMs": 604800000}, {"durationMs": 2592000000}, {"durationMs": 7776000000}], "allowCustom": true}, "label": "Time Range"}, {"id": "sip_sev_filter", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "SeverityFilter", "type": 2, "isRequired": false, "multiSelect": true, "quote": "", "delimiter": ",", "query": "SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc", "typeSettings": {"additionalResourceOptions": ["value::all"]}, "defaultValue": "value::all", "label": "Severity"}]}, "name": "parameters"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Stolen Cookies", 0, 1, "Affected Users", 0, 2, "Target Domains", 0, 3, "Infected Devices", 0, 4]),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Stolen Cookies", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Affected Users", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(target_domain) | extend Label="Target Domains", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(infected_machine_id) | extend Label="Infected Devices", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc", "size": 4, "title": "Stolen Cookie Summary", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "tiles", "tileSettings": {"titleContent": {"columnMatch": "Label", "formatter": 1}, "leftContent": {"columnMatch": "Value", "formatter": 12, "formatOptions": {"palette": "auto"}}}}, "name": "sipTiles"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(target_domain)
| summarize StolenCookies=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email), UniqueDevices=dcount(infected_machine_id) by tostring(target_domain)
| order by StolenCookies desc
| take 20)", "size": 1, "title": "Top 20 Targeted Domains by Stolen Cookies", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "barchart"}, "name": "topTargetDomains"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize StolenCookies=count(), TargetDomains=dcount(target_domain) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)", "size": 0, "title": "Stolen Cookie Ingestion Trend (Daily)", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "linechart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "StolenCookies", "color": "redBright"}, {"seriesName": "TargetDomains", "color": "blue"}]}}, "name": "cookieTrend"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize StolenCookies=count(), TargetDomains=dcount(target_domain), MaxSeverity=max(severity), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| top 25 by MaxSeverity desc, StolenCookies desc
| project User=email, RiskLevel, StolenCookies, TargetDomains, LatestExposure)", "size": 0, "title": "Top 25 Users with Stolen Session Cookies", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"sortBy": [{"itemKey": "StolenCookies", "sortOrder": 2}]}}, "name": "topAffectedUsers"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by SeverityLabel)", "size": 3, "title": "Cookie Severity Distribution", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "piechart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "Critical", "color": "redBright"}, {"seriesName": "High", "color": "orange"}, {"seriesName": "Medium", "color": "yellow"}, {"seriesName": "Low", "color": "blue"}]}}, "name": "cookieSeverityPie"}], "templateMetadata": {"version": "1.0", "connectorAssociation": [{"connectorId": "SpyCloudSIP", "dataTypes": ["SpyCloudSipCookies_CL"]}]}}
